# CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicCornerTextView

**Class**

A template for displaying a SwiftUI view and text in the clock face’s corner.

## Declaration

```swift
final class CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicCornerTextView<Label> where Label : View
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/graphicCorner] family.  shows the layout of the view and where the template might appear on the clock face.



The following table lists the dimensions of the view displayed by the template. The template masks the view to a circle.



## Creating the Template

- **init(textProvider:label:)**: Creates a template with a line of text and a SwiftUI view.

## Accessing the Content

- **textProvider**: The text provider for the text.
- **label**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.

## Corner templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicCornerCircularView**: A template for displaying a SwiftUI view in the clock face’s corner.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicCornerGaugeView**: A template for displaying a SwiftUI view and a gauge in the clock face’s corner.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
